label: Shimmer pre-grade composite — portals and sky graded together as one image
notes: Moved shimmer from post-caustic Screen layer to pre-color-grade composite. Created comp_pregrade (Screen: null_sky + null_shimmer) feeding into hsv_underwater. Now both sky and portal swirls go through hsv_underwater → lvc_underwater → ramp_lookup together — portal dark areas pull to ramp_palette deep blue-black instead of being transparent Screen overlays. comp_shimmer bypassed (orphaned). glsl_vignette now wires from comp_caustic directly.
